content:
MOXIE BEAUTY 
Customer Success Handbook Complete Knowledge Base  |  Internal Use Only 
Last Updated: April 2026 CS Team Only   

How To Use This Knowledge Base This is your single source of truth for all customer interactions: WhatsApp, Email, Instagram DMs, and Calls. Use it to find the right product information, understand concerns, and write warm on-brand responses.  Golden Rules • Lead with empathy before jumping to solutions. • Sound warm, never scripted or corporate. • Never offer a replacement or return straight away. Troubleshoot first. • Suggest a call whenever a concern is complex or the customer is frustrated. • For wavy/curly product recommendations, always ask for a photo of hair brushed out first. • If anything feels unclear after two rounds of troubleshooting, flag to Rupika.  FLAG TO RUPIKA: Always escalate to Rupika when: medical or safety concerns arise, a customer reports an allergic reaction, there is a potential PR-sensitive complaint, unusual product defects are flagged, a compensation decision is required, or standard troubleshooting has not resolved the issue after two rounds.

1A. Wave Enhancing Range For wavy hair (2A, 2B, 2C). Goal: enhance natural wave pattern, fight frizz, add definition without weighing hair down.  Product Key Benefit Key Notes Gentle Cleansing Shampoo  Cleanses without stripping; preserves wave pattern Contains protein. Sulfate-free. Can double-cleanse after oiling. Ultra Hydrating Conditioner  Deep moisture, detangling, softness Contains protein. Three butters (Cocoa, Shea, Mango) plus Almond Oil. Apply mid-lengths to ends only. Weightless Leave-In Conditioner Moisture, frizz control, wave prep. Step 3 of wavy routine. Contains protein. Apply on SOAKING WET hair only. Raisin to almond-sized amount (depending on hair length). Flexi Styling Serum Gel Frizz control and flexible hold. Step 4 of wavy routine. Protein-free. Non-sticky. Medium-flexible hold. Apply on SOAKING WET hair after leave-in. Scrunch out crunch once fully dry.  The Moxie Wavy Routine: Step by Step NOTE: The most common mistake: applying Steps 3 and 4 on damp hair instead of soaking wet hair. When hair is dripping wet, the cuticle is open and product absorbs properly. Even slightly damp hair causes frizz and poor definition.  Step Product How to Apply Step 1: Cleanse Gentle Cleansing Shampoo Fully wet hair. Massage into scalp. Rinse thoroughly. Can do two rounds if post-oiling. Step 2: Condition Ultra Hydrating Conditioner Mid-lengths to ends only. Leave 2 to 3 minutes. Rinse well. Step 3: Leave-In Weightless Leave-In Conditioner Hair must be DRIPPING WET. Rake through with fingers from roots to tips. Raisin to almond-sized amount. Step 4: Gel Flexi Styling Serum Gel Hair still DRIPPING WET, immediately after Step 3. Scrunch or rake through in sections. Air dry or diffuse on low. Scrunch out crunch once fully dry.

Step-by-step Wave Enhancing routine:

Step by Step NOTE: The most common mistake: applying Steps 3 and 4 on damp hair instead of soaking wet hair. When hair is dripping wet, the cuticle is open and product absorbs properly. Even slightly damp hair causes frizz and poor definition.  Step Product How to Apply Step 1: Cleanse Gentle Cleansing Shampoo Fully wet hair. Massage into scalp. Rinse thoroughly. Can do two rounds if post-oiling. Step 2: Condition Ultra Hydrating Conditioner Mid-lengths to ends only. Leave 2 to 3 minutes. Rinse well. Step 3: Leave-In Weightless Leave-In Conditioner Hair must be DRIPPING WET. Rake through with fingers from roots to tips. Raisin to almond-sized amount. Step 4: Gel Flexi Styling Serum Gel Hair still DRIPPING WET, immediately after Step 3. Scrunch or rake through in sections. Air dry or diffuse on low. Scrunch out crunch once fully dry.

CLINICALLY TESTED (Mascot Spincontrol, ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas certified) - Weightless Leave-In + Flexi Serum Gel: 96.98% curl/wave retention up to 8 hours post application 

- Reduces hair frizz by 41.64% at 8 hours post application - Improves hair smoothness by 41.35% at 8 hours post application - Improves hair softness by 41.78% at 8 hours post application - Improves hair manageability by 43.90% at 8 hours post application - Improves hair shine by 37.28% at 8 hours post application (glossymeter) - Reduces hair dryness by 43.58% at 8 hours post application - Provides curl definition by 89.87% at 8 hours post application - Improves hair volume by 32.16% at 8 hours post application In-vitro instrumental haircare study on human hair swatches, Mascot Spincontrol (ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas). Study code: XXX-RH01-QM-NR25. Dec 2025.

1B. Curl Defining Range For curly hair (3A, 3B, 3C). Goal: definition, bounce, moisture, long-lasting curl structure.  Product Key Benefit Key Notes Gentle Cleansing Shampoo Cleanses without stripping Same as wavy range. Contains protein. Ultra Hydrating Conditioner Deep moisture and detangle Same as wavy range. Contains protein. Super Defining Curl Cream Curl definition, frizz control, softness. Step 3 of curly routine. Protein-free. Richer and heavier than Leave-In. Designed for 3A+ hair. Apply on SOAKING WET hair. Flexi Styling Serum Gel Hold and frizz seal. Step 4 of curly routine. Same gel as wavy routine. Apply on SOAKING WET hair on top of curl cream.  The Moxie Curly Routine: Step by Step Step Product How to Apply Step 1: Cleanse Gentle Cleansing Shampoo Same as wavy routine. Step 2: Condition Ultra Hydrating Conditioner Mid-lengths to ends. 2 to 3 minutes. Rinse. Step 3: Curl Cream Super Defining Curl Cream Hair must be DRIPPING WET. Rake and scrunch through sections. More product than the leave-in. Step 4: Gel Flexi Styling Serum Gel Hair still DRIPPING WET, on top of curl cream. Scrunch upward to encourage curl clumping. Air dry or diffuse on low.

Step-by-step Curl Defining routine:

Step by Step Step Product How to Apply Step 1: Cleanse Gentle Cleansing Shampoo Same as wavy routine. Step 2: Condition Ultra Hydrating Conditioner Mid-lengths to ends. 2 to 3 minutes. Rinse. Step 3: Curl Cream Super Defining Curl Cream Hair must be DRIPPING WET. Rake and scrunch through sections. More product than the leave-in. Step 4: Gel Flexi Styling Serum Gel Hair still DRIPPING WET, on top of curl cream. Scrunch upward to encourage curl clumping. Air dry or diffuse on low.

CLINICALLY TESTED (Mascot Spincontrol, ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas certified) - Super Defining Curl Cream + Flexi Serum Gel: 92.94% curl retention (curl hold) at 8 hours post application - Curl definition by 90.32% at 8 hours post application - Reduces hair frizz by 46.03% at 8 hours post application - Improves hair smoothness by 45.67% at 8 hours post application - Improves hair softness by 48.08% at 8 hours post application - Improves hair manageability by 47.80% at 8 hours post application 

- Improves moisture retention by 13.09% at 8 hours post application  - Reduces hair dryness by 46.20% at 8 hours post application  - Improves hair shine by 46.11% at 8 hours post application (glossymeter) - Zero crunchy cast or residue at 8 hours post application (6.25% improvement in hair feel vs control)  In-vitro instrumental haircare study on human hair swatches, Mascot Spincontrol (ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas). Study code: XXX-RH02-QM-NR25. Dec 2025.

1C. Frizz Fighting Range For all hair types dealing with frizz, dryness, and UV damage. No curl-defining steps needed.  Product Key Benefit Notes Gentle Cleansing Shampoo Gentle cleanse, preserves moisture Works for most hair types as a general cleansing shampoo. Ultra Hydrating Conditioner Intense moisture, smoothness Use after shampoo. Mid-lengths to ends. Frizz Fighting Hair Serum SPF35 Anti-frizz plus UV protection Use on soaking wet hair. 1 to 2 pumps. Not a curl styler and does not replace leave-in or gel in the wavy/curly routine.

CLINICALLY TESTED (Mascot Spincontrol, ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas certified) - Frizz Fighting Hair Serum: reduces hair frizz by 42.66% after product application - Improves hair softness by 44.34% after product application - Improves hair manageability by 43.96% after product application - Improves hair shine by 45.63% after product application - Reduces hair dryness by 43.61% after product application - Improves moisture retention by 10.01% after product application  In-vitro instrumental haircare study on human hair swatches, Mascot Spincontrol (ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas). Study code: XXX-SH01-QM-NR25. Dec 2025.

1D. Scalp Reviving (ScalpSOS) Range For dandruff-prone, oily, itchy, or flaky scalps. Use 'scalp care' not 'dandruff' in customer messaging. Clinically tested.  Product Key Benefit Active Ingredients Dandruff Detox Pre-Wash Treatment Scalp exfoliation and barrier reset MCT Oil, AHAs and BHAs. Apply 5 to 30 mins before shampoo on dry scalp. Scalp Reviving Shampoo Removes flakes, controls scalp yeast, soothes itch AHAs (Lactic, Glycolic), Piroctone Olamine. Use 2 to 3 times per week. Moisture Restoring Conditioner 175ml Hydrates hair without burdening a reactive scalp Cocoa Butter, Biotin, Menthol. Protein-free. Apply mid-lengths to ends only. Daily Calming Leave-On Serum Daily scalp maintenance between washes CICA, Ashwagandha, Hyaluronate, Zinc, Copper. Applied to scalp only. Can use any 

time. Safe on colour-treated and nanoplastia hair.

CLINICALLY TESTED (Mascot Spincontrol, ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas certified) - 81% of users reported dandruff reduction in 14 days - 100% of users reported dandruff reduction in 28 days - 81% of users experienced itch relief in 14 days - 100% of users experienced itch relief in 28 days - 89% of users agreed scalp was not dried out in 14 days - 100% of users agreed scalp was not dried out in 28 days - 83% of users noticed softer, smoother hair in 14 days - 100% of users noticed softer, smoother hair in 28 days - 92% of users reported a clean, fresh scalp in 14 days - 100% of users reported a clean, fresh scalp in 28 days - Reduces adherent scalp flaking by 25.74% in 14 days and 45.17% in 28 days (dermatological evaluation, ASFS grading method) - 100% of users reported easy application for all 4 products in the range  Consumer feedback clinical trial on 36 volunteers + dermatological efficacy evaluation (ASFS grading). Mascot Spincontrol (ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas). Study code: XXX-XI01-QM-OR25.

1E. HydroRepair Range For colour-damaged, heat-damaged, or fragile hair. Skincare-grade actives for cumulative repair over 2 to 4 weeks, not instant results.  Product Key Benefit Key Notes HA Repairing Shampoo Strengthening and deep hydration while cleansing Protein-free. Sodium Hyaluronate, Macadamia Oil, Brown Seaweed Extract. HA Repairing Conditioner Revival, repair, nourishment Contains amino acids and Pea Extract. Cocoa Butter, Apricot Kernel Oil. Mid-lengths to ends. HA Hair Serum  Skincare actives for damaged hair: the core product of the range Protein-free. Sodium Hyaluronate, Brown Seaweed, Sunflower Oil. Apply to damp or dry hair.

CLINICALLY TESTED (Mascot Spincontrol, ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas certified) - HA Repairing Shampoo + HA Repairing Conditioner + HA Hair Serum: helps provide hair damage repair effect by 40.22% after 3 applications - Improves hair smoothness by 97.59% after 3 applications - Improves hair softness by 90.42% after 3 applications - Improves hair shine by 81.14% after 3 applications - Improves hair manageability by 46.47% after 3 applications - Reduces hair frizz by 51.14% after 3 applications - Reduces split ends by 20.21% after 3 applications - Reduces hair breakage by 22.58% after 3 applications - Improves tensile strength by 12.12% after 3 applications - Conditioning effect (wet combing) improved by 15.01% after 3 applications 

- Conditioning effect (dry combing) improved by 27.31% after 3 applications In-vitro instrumental haircare study on human hair swatches, Mascot Spincontrol (ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas). Study code: XXX-KH01-QM-MY25. Oct 2025.

1F. Style Sculpting Range  Product Used For Key Notes On The Fly Hair Finishing Stick (OTF) Flyaways, baby hairs, light frizz taming on dry styled hair Mascara-style applicator. Alcohol present in small functional amounts, balanced with glycerine, aloe vera, banana extract. Light-to-medium hold. Touch-up product. The Headliner Hair Wax Stick Strong hold styling, sleek looks, edge control Plant waxes and oils. Strong hold. Semi-matte finish. Hold is buildable. Use with the Hair Finishing Brush. Hair Finishing Brush Precise application with Headliner or OTF Sold in duo with Headliner. For styled dry hair only. Not a detangling brush. Cheat Day Dry Shampoo + Blending Brush Between-wash refresh, absorb oil Spray at roots, let sit, blend with brush.  Deep Dive Hair Mask Intensive weekly conditioning for all hair types Replace the conditioner step once a week. Leave on 5 to 10 minutes after shampooing. Peptides, Niacinamide, Coffee Cherry Extract, Shea and Cocoa Butters. Firefighter Heat Protection Spray Heat protection before blow drying and heat styling Oil-based (Olive, Argan, Vitamin E). Spray 2 pumps on mid-lengths, apply using hand. Apply before heat styling, not after.

CLINICALLY TESTED (Mascot Spincontrol, ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas certified) - Deep Dive Hair Mask: improves hair softness by 49.53% after 3 applications - Improves hair shine by 47.14% after 3 applications - Improves hair smoothness by 45.83% after 3 applications - Improves hair manageability by 41.31% after 3 applications - Reduces hair frizz by 36.68% after 3 applications - Retains moisture by 13.71% after 3 applications - Conditioning effect (wet combing) improved by 20.80% after 3 applications - Conditioning effect (dry combing) improved by 30.03% after 3 applications In-vitro instrumental haircare study on human hair swatches, Mascot Spincontrol (ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas). Study code: XXX-CH01-QM-JY25. Sep 2025.
1G. Gentle Cleansing Shampoo + Ultra Hydrating Conditioner (Core Duo) Clinical data for the GCS and UHC combination used as the base of the wavy and curly routines.

CLINICALLY TESTED (Mascot Spincontrol, ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas certified) - Reduces hair breakage by 47.83% after 6 washes - Improves hair softness by 50.00% after 6 washes - Reduces hair dryness by 42.94% after 6 washes 

- Reduces hair frizz by 41.06% after 6 washes - Improves hair volume by 44.17% after 6 washes - Improves moisture retention by 21.23% after 6 washes - Improves tensile strength by 15.24% after 6 washes - Conditioning effect (wet combing) improved by 25.81% after 6 washes - Conditioning effect (dry combing) improved by 34.89% after 6 washes  In-vitro instrumental haircare study on human hair swatches, Mascot Spincontrol (ISO 9001, Bureau Veritas). Study code: XXX-CH02-QM-NR25. Jan 2026.

2A. Which Shampoo? All three shampoos are sulfate-free and use mild surfactants. They differ significantly in their actives and who they are for.   Gentle Cleansing Shampoo HA Repairing Shampoo Scalp Reviving Shampoo Best for Wavy and curly hair as the routine shampoo. General use for most hair types. 
Colour-damaged, heat-damaged, chemically treated, dry or brittle hair. 
Dandruff-prone, oily, itchy, or flaky scalps. Any hair type with scalp concerns. Primary job Gentle cleanse that preserves moisture and wave or curl integrity Gentle cleanse with repair actives built in for damaged hair Targeted scalp treatment: removes flakes, controls yeast, reduces itch Key actives Wheat/Soy Amino Acids, Keratin Amino Acids, Hydrolysed Sweet Almond Protein, Linseed and Chia Extracts, Yacon Root Extract 
Sodium Hyaluronate, Brown Seaweed Extract, Macadamia Oil. Protein-free. 
Piroctone Olamine (anti-fungal), AHAs (Lactic, Glycolic), Brown Seaweed. Protein-free. 
Protein? Yes: multiple protein and amino acid sources No No Works for straight hair? Yes, general use Yes, especially post-damage Yes, for scalp concerns regardless of texture Can combine with other range conditioners? Yes: pairs well with Moisture Restoring Conditioner if scalp concern is present 
Yes: swap shampoo within the HydroRepair routine Yes: pairs very well with Ultra Hydrating Conditioner for combined scalp and strand care

Shampoo Troubleshooting Situation What To Tell Them GCS not cleansing well enough Try double-cleansing, especially after oiling. The first wash lifts the oil; the second cleanses the scalp properly. GCS can also be diluted slightly for more spreadability. GCS causing dryness GCS is a cleanser only. It must always be followed with the conditioner, which restores moisture. Check they are not over-washing (more than 3 times per week for wavy/curly hair). 

HA Repairing Shampoo not showing results This range needs consistent use over 2 to 4 weeks. It also works best as a 3-step system with the conditioner and serum. Using the shampoo alone will not show repair results. Scalp Reviving Shampoo making hair dry The scalp shampoo is focused on the scalp, not strand moisture. It must always be followed with the Moisture Restoring Conditioner or Ultra Hydrating Conditioner on mid-lengths and ends. GCS worsening dandruff GCS is not formulated to treat dandruff. Suggest switching to the ScalpSOS range, or using Scalp Reviving Shampoo in rotation. Shampoo solidifying in cold weather Normal for naturally derived surfactants (similar to coconut oil). Run bottle under warm water for a minute. Returns to normal with no impact on efficacy.

2B. Which Conditioner? All conditioners are silicone-free. They differ in weight, texture, and purpose.   Ultra Hydrating Conditioner Moisture Restoring Conditioner HA Repairing Conditioner Best for Wavy and curly hair. Any hair type needing rich moisture. Works as a quick mask. 
Scalp-concern customers using the ScalpSOS range. Balanced moisture without burdening a reactive scalp. 
Colour or heat damaged hair using the HydroRepair range. 
Texture and weight Richest of the three. Three butters (Cocoa, Shea, Mango) plus Almond Oil. 
Medium. Lighter than UHC. Cocoa Butter, Biotin, Retinyl Palmitate, Menthol cooling finish. 
Medium. Cocoa Butter, Apricot Kernel Oil, Pea Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate. 
Protein? Yes: Keratin Amino Acids No Yes: Amino Acids and Pea Extract Apply where? Mid-lengths to ends only. Never the scalp. Mid-lengths to ends only. Never the scalp. Mid-lengths to ends only. Works with other range shampoos? Yes: pairs very well with Scalp Reviving Shampoo for combined scalp and strand care. 
Yes: can pair with GCS if scalp concern is mild. Best as part of the HydroRepair 3-step system.

Conditioner Troubleshooting Situation What To Tell Them Ultra Hydrating Conditioner feels too heavy Check they are applying only mid-lengths to ends, not roots. Start with a smaller amount (almond-sized for shoulder-length hair). For fine or straight 

hair, UHC may genuinely be too rich; HA Repairing Conditioner could be a better fit. Hair feels greasy after conditioning Conditioner is going too close to the scalp. Ensure full rinsing. Too much product is also a common cause for fine or straight hair. Conditioner not improving moisture Conditioner is a wash-off product. The full routine (cleanse, condition, leave-in, gel) is designed as a system. The leave-in is what maintains moisture between washes. Moisture Restoring Conditioner feels too light This conditioner is intentionally lighter to suit scalp-concern customers. For more moisture, they can use it alongside the Ultra Hydrating Conditioner, or add a leave-in step.

2C. Which Styler: Leave-In, Curl Cream, Gel, or Frizz Serum? NOTE: Critical clarification on Frizz Fighting Serum: it can be used on SOAKING WET hair. It is NOT a dry-hair product or finishing product. It is also NOT a replacement for the Weightless Leave-In in the wavy routine. The leave-in and the serum serve different jobs and should NOT be layered together in the same wet session.   Weightless Leave-In Super Defining Curl Cream Flexi Styling Serum Gel Primary job Moisture plus wave enhancement. Primes wavy hair for curl formation. 
Curl definition plus moisture. Primes curly hair for hold and structure. 
Seals in moisture, provides flexible hold, locks out frizz. The finishing layer over the leave-in or curl cream. Hair type Wavy (2A to 2C). Finer or lower-porosity wavy hair that needs light moisture. 
Curly (3A to 3C). Coarser or more porous hair that needs richer conditioning. 
Both wavy and curly. Step 4 in both routines. 
When to apply On SOAKING WET hair. Step 3 in the wavy routine. On SOAKING WET hair. Step 3 in the curly routine. On SOAKING WET hair, immediately after Step 3. Texture and weight Very light watery conditioner texture. No hold. Richer and creamier. More weight and slip. No hold on its own. 
Light water-based gel. Medium-flexible hold. Non-sticky. Protein? Yes: Keratin Amino Acids No Yes: Keratin Amino Acids (trace)

Can combine? Leave-In + Gel: yes, this IS the wavy routine. Leave-In + Frizz Serum in same session: no, will cause heaviness. 
Curl Cream + Gel: yes, this IS the curly routine. Curl Cream + Frizz Serum in same session: no. 
Always paired with Leave-In or Curl Cream as Step 4. 
 Step 3 vs Step 4: The Core Difference Step 3 (Leave-In or Curl Cream) Step 4 (Gel) Weightless Leave-In for wavy, Super Defining Curl Cream for curly Flexi Styling Serum Gel for both wavy and curly Delivers moisture and prepares hair for definition Seals in moisture, provides flexible hold, locks out frizz Applied first on soaking wet hair Applied second on soaking wet hair, directly on top of Step 3 Think: skincare moisturiser Think: skincare sealer that locks in the moisturiser Start small: raisin-sized for fine hair, build up if needed More than almond-sized causes heaviness and buildup

Styler Troubleshooting Situation What To Tell Them Weightless Leave-In feels greasy Most likely: applying to hair that is damp or towel-dried rather than soaking wet. On damp hair, product sits on the surface instead of absorbing. Second cause: using too much. Start raisin-sized. For very fine hair, try halving the amount. Super Defining Curl Cream not defining curls Soaking wet application is key. Even 30% dry before applying causes poor definition. Also: they may need more product than expected. Curl cream works better with a generous amount. Must be followed by the gel (Step 4) to hold the shape. Gel creating crunch or stiffness Normal during the drying phase. Once 100% dry, scrunch the cast with clean hands or a microfibre cloth. If crunch persists, they are using too much gel. Products pilling or curdling when layered The leave-in has not settled before the gel went on. Wait 30 to 60 seconds after applying leave-in. Emulsify gel in palms before applying. Do not mix both directly in hands at the same time. Frizz Serum feels too heavy or oily 1 to 2 pumps is sufficient for most lengths. For fine hair, spray onto palms first and lightly pat over hair rather than applying directly. Frizz Serum not controlling frizz Check when they are applying it. On soaking wet hair: 1 to 2 pumps, raked through. On dry hair: smoothed over the surface. It is not designed to replace the wet routine steps for wavy/curly hair.

Customer wants to use Frizz Serum inside wavy/curly routine Do not layer the serum with the leave-in or curl cream in the same wet session. Use the serum either on dry hair after the routine has fully dried, or use it alone on soaking wet hair on non-routine wash days when frizz control is the only goal.  Which Styler for Which Hair Type? Hair situation Recommended styler path Why Wavy hair (2A, 2B), finer strands Weightless Leave-In + Flexi Gel Leave-in is lighter and will not weigh down fine waves Wavy hair (2C), thicker or more porous Can try Curl Cream + Flexi Gel, or increase quantity of Leave-In + Gel 2C sits at the wavy-curly boundary and may need more moisture Curly hair (3A, 3B, 3C) Super Defining Curl Cream + Flexi Gel Curl cream is richer and designed for tighter patterns and higher porosity Straight or slightly wavy hair with frizz Frizz Fighting Serum (on soaking wet or dry hair) No curl-defining products needed; serum alone handles moisture and frizz Colour-damaged or fragile hair (wavy/curly) HydroRepair routine first, then add wavy/curly stylers Repair shampoo and conditioner first; stylers can remain the same Protein-sensitive hair Avoid GCS, UHC, WLIC. Use Curl Cream + Gel, or HA Shampoo + HA Conditioner + Frizz Serum Curl cream, frizz serum, HA shampoo, and HA serum are all protein-free Low-porosity hair (product sits on surface) Use less product than the recommendation; apply only on very saturated wet hair; reduce protein-heavy steps 
Low-porosity hair has a tight cuticle that needs full saturation for product to absorb

Section 3: Hair Type Reference and Recommendations  Hair Type Description Recommended Routine Type 1A to 1C (Straight) Straight with slight texture; 1C has some body Frizz Fighting range for frizz. HydroRepair for damage. OTF or Headliner for style. Type 2A to 2B (Wavy) Loose waves, prone to frizz, can lose definition Wavy Routine (4 steps). Frizz Serum on dry styled hair as a finisher. Type 2C (Wavy-Curly boundary) Strong waves or light curls, needs more definition Wavy Routine as base. Can experiment with Curl Cream in Step 3 if more definition needed. Type 3A (Loose Curls) Defined curls, prone to frizz and dryness Curly Routine (4 steps). Deep Dive Mask weekly. Type 3B to 3C (Tight Curls) Springy voluminous curls, high moisture need Curly Routine with more product. Deep Dive Mask. Firefighter for any heat styling. Dandruff-prone or oily scalp Flaking, itch, oiliness across any hair type ScalpSOS 4-step range. Can combine with wavy/curly routine by swapping the shampoo. Colour-treated or damaged Brittle dry ends, breakage, frizz post-treatment HydroRepair Routine Keratin or nanoplastia treated Chemically smoothed hair needing gentle care All products are safe. Stylers will only define new growth, not treated lengths. Pregnancy or breastfeeding Safety-conscious customers All products are clean: no sulfates, parabens, or phthalates. Standard advice: always consult a doctor for individual assessment. Children's hair Parents asking on behalf of kids GCS and UHC are gentle and safe. For curly kids, the wavy trio works well due to its lighter weight. Supervised use under age 8 to prevent ingestion.

Section 4: Key Ingredients and FAQs  Protein Content Across All Products NOTE: Protein-sensitive customers may experience stiffness, dryness, or breakage from overuse of protein-containing products. Recommend the protein-free alternatives listed below.  Contains Protein Protein-Free Gentle Cleansing Shampoo (Wheat/Soy Amino Acids, Hydrolysed Almond Protein, Keratin Amino Acids) Hyaluronic Acid Repairing Shampoo Ultra Hydrating Conditioner (Keratin Amino Acids) Scalp Reviving Shampoo Weightless Leave-In Conditioner (Keratin Amino Acids) Moisture Restoring Conditioner Flexi Styling Serum Gel (Keratin Amino Acids, trace) Super Defining Curl Cream HA Repairing Conditioner (Amino Acids, Pea Extract) Frizz Fighting Hair Serum Cheat Day Dry Shampoo (Hydrolysed Pea Protein) Hyaluronic Acid Hair Serum Deep Dive Hair Mask (Hydrolysed Pea Protein, peptides) Cocoa Hemp and Almond Hair Oil, Firefighter, OTF, Headliner, Dandruff Detox Pre-Wash, Daily Calming Serum  Fragrance All fragrances are IFRA-compliant. No fragrance-free versions are available. Summer Dew-1017/MOD Benzyl Benzoate, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Hexamethylindanopyran, Citral, Citronellol Floral Drop Haircare-1128/MOD Citronellol, alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Terpineol General formula fragrances Limonene, Geraniol, Linalool, Terpineol, Terpinolene, Isoeugenol On The Fly fragrance Citronellol, Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool, Terpineol, Terpinolene, Isoeugenol. Light, fresh, floral.  FLAG TO RUPIKA: If a customer reports a suspected allergic reaction to fragrance: do not troubleshoot. Flag immediately to Rupika. Ask the customer to discontinue use and consult a dermatologist.  SPF in Frizz Fighting Serum

UV rays damage the outer cuticle of hair strands, causing dryness, brittleness, colour fade, and frizz. The Frizz Fighting Serum is SPF35, protecting strands from UV damage while controlling frizz. Think of it as sunscreen for hair.  Alcohol in On The Fly The isopropyl alcohol in OTF is in a small functional amount to help the product glide and set quickly. It is balanced with humectants and conditioning agents (glycerin, aloe vera, banana extract, polyquats) and does not dry out hair when used as directed.  Phthalate-Free Confirmation Yes. All Moxie products are phthalate-free. This can be confirmed directly to any customer who asks.  Menthol in Scalp Products Menthol appears in the Moisture Restoring Conditioner for a cooling, soothing feel. It is not in the Scalp Reviving Shampoo by design: menthol creates sensation but does not address the root cause of dandruff and can irritate sensitive scalps. The shampoo uses clinically proven actives like Piroctone Olamine instead.

Wavy or Curly Routine Not Working • Ask: soaking wet or damp hair when applying? • Ask: how much product? Too little gives no definition; too much gives heaviness. • Did they scrunch out the crunch once fully dry? Often the missing step. • Have they brushed hair after drying? This breaks curl pattern. • Hard water reduces product performance significantly. • Offer a call if text troubleshooting is not resolving it. FLAG TO RUPIKA: If two-plus rounds of troubleshooting have not resolved the issue, flag to Rupika before making any replacement decision.

metadata.problem: Wavy or Curly Routine Not Working

content: Hair Feels Rough or Stiff After Routine • Most common: did not scrunch out the cast after hair was fully dry. Scrunch with clean hands or microfibre cloth once 100% dry. • Second: protein overload on protein-sensitive hair. Reduce leave-in frequency or switch to protein-free Curl Cream. • Third: too much gel. Reduce to almond-sized.

More Frizzy After Routine • Most likely: applying products on damp rather than soaking wet hair. Number one culprit. • Second: touching hair while drying or using high heat. • Third: too little product or missing the gel layer. • Fourth: hard water. Suggest a clarifying wash (we don’t have a clarifying shampoo).

Shampoo Causing Dryness • Sulfate-free shampoos lather differently. This is normal. • Shampoo cleanses only. Conditioner restores moisture. Dryness usually resolves with the full routine. • Check for over-washing: more than 3 times per week for wavy/curly hair is often too much.

Products Causing Hairfall • Our products are clean and do not cause hairfall. Validate the concern warmly. 

• Customers sometimes notice shed hair more clearly once curls or waves are defined. • Hairfall is typically caused by nutritional deficiency, stress, hormonal changes, or underlying scalp conditions. FLAG TO RUPIKA: If a customer insists the products are causing significant hairfall and is distressed, flag to Rupika. Suggest a trichologist.

Products Causing Acne or Breakouts • Hairline or forehead: likely conditioner residue. Remind them to rinse thoroughly and avoid applying conditioner close to the face. • Back or neck: same cause. Rinse hair forward, wrap away from back after washing. FLAG TO RUPIKA: Severe or widespread reaction: flag to Rupika immediately. Ask customer to stop using the product and consult a dermatologist.

Firefighter Heat Protection Spray Feeling Greasy • This formula is oil-based. Use 2 pumps maximum distributed through mid-lengths on damp hair. • For fine hair: spray onto palms first, then lightly spread over hair.

metadata.problem: Firefighter Heat Protection Spray Feeling Greasy

content: HydroRepair Range Not Working • Results build over 2 to 4 weeks. Set this expectation clearly. • Check whether they are still using heat without protection. Ongoing damage cannot be repaired. • Check they are using all three steps, not just the shampoo.

Deep Dive Mask Did Not Work • Leave on minimum 5 minutes, ideally 10. • Apply to dripping wet hair after shampooing, mid-lengths to ends. • Not for daily use. Replace the conditioner step once or twice a week.

metadata.problem: Deep Dive Mask Did Not Work

content: Shampoo Solidifying in Cold Weather • Normal for naturally derived surfactants. Run bottle under warm water for 1 to 2 minutes. Returns to normal with no impact on efficacy.

Products Pilling or Curdling When Layered • Wait 30 to 60 seconds after applying leave-in before applying gel. • Emulsify gel in palms before applying. Do not mix both products directly in hands at the same time.

Section 6: Special Use Cases and Edge Cases  Situation Response Guidance Wavy/curly recommendation request Ask for a photo of hair brushed out first. Helps identify true hair type before recommending a routine. Oiling before wash (champi) GCS removes oil in one wash for most. For heavy oiling, suggest double-cleanse. Oiling after styling (leave-in + gel) Yes. Can oil 2 to 3 days after styling, then follow the routine fresh on next wash day. The oil acts as a pre-wash. Frizz Serum in wavy routine Do not layer with leave-in in the same session. Use the serum on dry styled hair as a finishing product, or use it alone on soaking wet hair on days when frizz control is the only goal. Frizz Serum on dry hair Yes. 1 to 2 pumps smoothed over dry styled hair for frizz control and UV protection. Blowdry or straighten after Frizz Serum Yes. SPF also provides some light heat protection, but for heavy heat styling, use Firefighter as the dedicated heat protectant. Scalp Reviving Shampoo plus Ultra Hydrating Conditioner Great combination. Scalp shampoo targets scalp concern; UHC restores moisture to the lengths. Daily Calming Serum on nanoplastia hair Yes. Safe for chemically treated hair. Applied only to the scalp. SOS routine on beard Yes, can help with dryness or flaking under the beard. Leave-in after semi-permanent colour Yes. Wait 48 to 72 hours post-colouring before starting the full routine. Daily Calming Serum at night Yes. Apply at night, wash next day as usual. Colour-treated hair plus wavy/curly routine Yes. The routines are safe for colour-treated hair. Add HydroRepair range for ends if damage is present. Keratin or nanoplastia treated lengths Stylers only define new growth, not treated lengths. Applying leave-in or curl cream to treated lengths makes them greasy with no benefit. Protein-sensitive hair Avoid GCS, UHC, and Weightless Leave-In. Use HA Shampoo, HA Conditioner, Super Defining Curl Cream, and Frizz Serum (all protein-free or lower in protein). Straight hair customer Frizz Fighting range is the primary recommendation. The wavy routine will not create waves that are not there. Hair growth or hairfall concern Moxie does not have a hair growth range. For hairfall, suggest ScalpSOS for scalp health. Recommend a trichologist for growth concerns. Alopecia Do not recommend specific products for the condition. Suggest consulting a dermatologist first. Flag to Rupika.

Pregnancy or breastfeeding Products are clean. Standard advice: consult a doctor for individual assessment. Children's hair Safe for children. Wavy trio (GCS, UHC, Leave-In) works well for curly kids. Supervised use under age 8. International shipping India only at this time.

Delivery Issues Issue Action Delayed beyond 10 days (prepaid) Offer refund or reship if 1 to 2 more days expected Delayed beyond 10 days (COD) Reship only. No cash refund for COD. DP not attempting delivery Escalate and switch courier if needed Order stuck at hub Escalate. Update customer. Fresh dispatch if no movement in 1 to 2 days. Marked delivered but not received Investigate with courier. If confirmed non-delivery, reship. RTO due to no response Re-confirm address. Re-ship, ideally as prepaid. Prepaid RTO with no delivery attempt Investigate with courier. If confirmed, re-ship at no charge. Missing items Reship immediately. Damaged or leaked product Request photo first, then reship. Wrong product received Request photo first. Initiate return and reship correct product.

Returns and Refunds INFO: Return window: 7 days from delivery. Valid reasons: wrong product, expired product, or damaged/leaked product on arrival. Unopened unused full-price items can be returned within 7 days for a full refund. No returns or refunds on sale items, opened products, or used products.  FLAG TO RUPIKA: Never immediately offer a return or refund. Troubleshoot first. If the issue is product performance rather than a defective item, the return policy does not apply. Escalate to Rupika for any edge case or post-7-day request.

Section 8: When to Flag to Rupika  FLAG Suspected allergic reaction: skin, scalp, or eyes FLAG Customer reports medical condition worsening after product use FLAG Severe or widespread breakout linked to products FLAG Unusual product defect: contamination, foreign substance, broken seal on delivery FLAG Customer threatening social media post, consumer forum complaint, or legal action FLAG Customer with alopecia seeking product advice for the condition FLAG Press, media, influencer, or brand partnership inquiry FLAG Return or refund request after the 7-day window FLAG Compensation decisions (free products, vouchers) outside standard policy FLAG Customer still unhappy after two rounds of troubleshooting FLAG Very young child using products (under 3 years) FLAG Pregnant customer who is anxious or has a specific medical condition FLAG Technical ingredient questions you cannot answer confidently FLAG Anything that feels off or uncertain. Better to flag than to guess.

Section 9: Tone and Response Templates  The Moxie CS Voice • Warm and real, not overly formal. Like a knowledgeable friend who genuinely cares. • Never clinical, robotic, dismissive, or defensive. • Lead with empathy before solutions. Acknowledge the frustration first. • Use first names where shared. Sign off with your own name. • Never promise what you cannot deliver. Be honest about timelines. Response Templates Product Not Working (Wavy or Curly) Hey [Name], We totally hear you, and we want to help you get the best out of your routine. Before we troubleshoot, could you share a quick photo of your hair brushed out? This really helps us understand your texture and give you the most accurate advice. Also, a quick question: are you applying the leave-in and gel on soaking wet hair? That is often the game-changer!  Order Delay Hi [Name],  We are really sorry about the delay. We know how frustrating this can be, especially when you are excited to try your new products. I have checked your order and [insert status]. I will personally keep an eye on this and update you by [date]. You have my word!  Suggesting a Call I think the best way to sort this out properly would be a quick 5-minute call. It is so much easier to walk through this in real time! Would you be open to that? We will get this sorted for you.  Return Request Within Policy Hi [Name],  So sorry to hear about this! This definitely should not have happened. Could you please share a photo of the [product]? Once we verify, we will get this sorted for you right away, either a replacement or a refund, whichever works for you.  

Return Request Outside Policy or After 7 Days [Do not respond independently. Flag to Rupika or Ashish or Shantam first with full context. Use the holding message below while you wait:] Hi [Name],  Thanks for reaching out. We completely understand your concern and want to make this right for you. Let me check with my team and get back to you within 24 hours. Really appreciate your patience!
